What?: You see a small cave concealed in the rocks.  The cave is not big enough for you to enter.  This is where the Goblins hide.
「什麼？」: 你看到岩石中隱藏著一個小洞穴。洞穴不夠大供你進入。這是哥布林躲藏的地方。

What?: You can not see a cave.
「什麼？」: 你看不到洞穴。

What?: Something about the bushes here gives you a very bad feeling.
「什麼？」: 這裡的灌木給你一種非常不好的感覺。

What?: You're not close to anything matching that description.
「什麼？」: 你沒有靠近任何符合該描述的東西。

What?: You find a small cave concealed in the rocks, just big enough for the Goblins to come through.
「什麼？」: 你發現了岩石中隱藏著一個小洞穴，剛好夠哥布林通過。

What?: Nothing here, but you're HOT!
「什麼？」: 這裡什麼都沒有，但你很接近了！
